title: Warm Start Transfer Schema
description: Content-free summary of a session warm-start transfer attempt. This contract records only transfer mode, coarse outcome labels, seed-count/candidate-pool diagnostics (never raw configs/measures), and refusal reason.

n_seed_configs_candidate.description: Total seed candidates considered for projection (post cap/criterion-filter, pre per-seed drop). Traigent#1725 g3:1.

candidate_total.description: True (uncapped) count of COMPLETED configuration runs available on the source experiment. Traigent#1725 g3:2.

truncated.description: True when candidate_total exceeds the seed-size cap that was applied. Traigent#1725 g3:2.

drop_reason_histogram.description: Aggregate {category: count} of per-seed projection drop reasons (e.g. out_of_space, empty_after_projection, invalid_configuration). Bucketed by category only -- never a raw knob/parameter name. Traigent#1725 g3:1.
